title: Os' Carved Wood
description: This is a resource pack that changes the appearance of stripped wood blocks to have a carved design, and changes wood blocks to have a half-carved design. Compatible with VanillaTweaks!
body:
[![FastClient Ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1dc21fae33dabdbc4a6109168110e69b42bf6f7.png)](https://fastclient.net/Oslypsis) # What Does This Pack Do? This pack changes the texture of stripped wood blocks to have a unique carved design on each type of wood. There are 3 add-ons you can choose from as well:
- Os' Improved Spruce removes the green spots on spruce-related blocks.
- Os' Improved Birch lightens the black spots on birch logs, and makes the inner wood lighter and paler.
- Os' Curracabah Acacia completely changes the orangey Acacia wood to be a new wood color we haven't seen in vanilla yet. --- Also available as an ItemsAdder add-on for your server! The add-on includes 10 new block textures, and 23 new item textures. It was only made possible by [Nozia](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/nozia/).
## Download the ItemsAdder add-on for your server via our [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/OsAndNoz) for $8. Here are the new blocks (without any add-ons) ![Picture of all the textures included in this pack](https://i.imgur.com/e98ufde.png) **Bamboo**
Show Bamboo Instructions How to get all the designs for bamboo ![Bamboo instructions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5560e4d03f4dc004106b1fbe5be56dd9c48f5345.png)
--- ![Get 25% off your first month with Bisect hosting using promo code oslypsis](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/c3960ebf-eb9a-4a08-b6b5-d9ea5104a60a.png)https://bisecthosting.com/oslypsis # Usage Rights Using/modifying for personal use is allowed. Use (even if modified) for monetized videos must include a link in the description back to either this page or the [project's official PlanetMinecraft page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/os-carved-wood-for-bedrock-replaces-stripped-bark-blocks-now-with-bamboo-and-cherry-wood/). Please ask before using my content in your mods/packs/etc. Do not redistribute. Using this pack as a template to make your own textures that work the same way in game as mine do is allowed and encouraged. Please note that I've changed some of the names of the files from their vanilla counterparts - you will need to keep these names when changing out the textures or the files will not be able to find the textures. # Social and Donation Links [![Join me on Discord](https://i.imgur.com/csRbGBw.png)](https://discord.gg/5fEusZCj72) [![Donate via PayPal](https://i.imgur.com/lGhDSBX.png)](https://www.paypal.me/emilybaucom94) [![Visit my Planet Minecraft page](https://i.imgur.com/zG48U4s.png)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/oslypsis/)[![Donate to The Trevor Project](https://i.imgur.com/0TpyVd4.png)](https://give.thetrevorproject.org/give/63307/#!/donation/checkout) [![Advertise here](https://i.imgur.com/zqkNdbZ.png)](https://emilybau.com) [![Click here to request a logo design of your own](https://i.imgur.com/AAMQcsI.png)](https://emilybau.com)
